title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week focused on fixing critical issues that were preventing automations from working properly. We resolved problems with Salesforce deployments getting stuck and HubSpot automations failing to start, plus improved how the platform handles complex multi-step workflows to make them more reliable.

entries.headline: Salesforce automations now handle state and country fields more reliably
details: OpsPal now automatically detects when your Salesforce org uses state and country picklists instead of text fields
Prevents automation failures when working with address-related data flows

entries.headline: Complex Salesforce deployments now run more smoothly
details: Multi-step deployment workflows are now handled through our improved processing system
Reduces timeouts and failures when deploying large or complex automation changes

entries.headline: HubSpot automations start properly again
details: Restored missing configuration that was preventing HubSpot automations from launching
All HubSpot workflows should now initialize without errors
